name: Foundational Prayers
description: Start your prayer journey with the most foundational prayers in the Christian faith.

prayers.title: Thank God for salvation
prayers.description: Express gratitude for the gift of eternal life through Jesus Christ.

prayers.title: Pray for daily guidance
prayers.description: Ask God to direct your steps and decisions today.

prayers.title: Confess and repent
prayers.description: Bring any known sin before God and receive His forgiveness.

prayers.title: Pray for your family
prayers.description: Lift up each family member by name — protection, health, and spiritual growth.

prayers.title: Pray for your church
prayers.description: Ask God to bless your pastor, leaders, and congregation.

prayers.title: Pray for strength
prayers.description: Ask for strength to resist temptation and persevere through trials.

prayers.title: Praise and worship
prayers.description: Spend time simply adoring God for who He is.

prayers.title: Pray for peace
prayers.description: Ask God to fill your heart and mind with His supernatural peace.
